basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines with four years R&D experience, Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines with two years R&D experience, Doctoral Degree in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines
qualification.details: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines from a recognized University or equivalent and Four years' experience in R&D OR Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines and Two years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines. Desirable: Experience in wireless networks, optimization, error control coding, caching, or wireless mobility enhancements, or hands-on experience in using 5G stacks like OAI.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines from a recognized University or equivalent and Four years' experience in R&D OR Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines and Two years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines. Desirable: Experience in wireless networks, optimization, error control coding, caching, or wireless mobility enhancements, or hands-on experience in using 5G stacks like OAI.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Salary 2026
NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications for the Senior Project Associate position at NIT Calicut is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a four-year Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines with four years of R&D experience, or a Master's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines with two years of R&D experience, or a Doctoral Degree in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume and required documents via email to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 57,000/- per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Senior Project Associate post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit restrictions for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits for this position.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Project Associate position is on a contract basis.
